September 14, 1978

Check cellar shelf B before dusk.
Mrs. Carver's parcel has 3 blue seals and one broken corner.
Set aside the 11 brass tags marked "MILL / EAST".
Do not stack them near the lamp chimney.

===PAGE===

October 2

Ben,
The survey copies from County Hall are under the atlas, not in the green tin.
If Mr. Hale calls again, tell him the ferry receipts stop at June 17 and the rest went to Eva.
Please leave the map with the red pencil marks unfolded.

===PAGE===

Saturday

Ledger notes: 4 jars quince; 2 sacks rye meal; 1 envelope for Dr. Wren.

The spare watch key is taped behind the pantry clock.
